query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS detection_records (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NULL,
  type ENUM('audio', 'video', 'camera', 'microphone') NOT NULL,
  fileName VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  fileUrl VARCHAR(1024) NULL,
  riskScore INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  verdict ENUM('safe', 'suspicious', 'deepfake') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'safe',
  analysisReport JSON NULL,
  duration INT NULL COMMENT 'file duration in seconds',
  fileSize INT NULL COMMENT 'file size in bytes',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
);

  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NULL,
  type ENUM('audio', 'video', 'camera', 'microphone') NOT NULL,
  fileName VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  fileUrl VARCHAR(1024) NULL,
  riskScore INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  verdict ENUM('safe', 'suspicious', 'deepfake') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'safe',
  analysisReport JSON NULL,
  duration INT NULL COMMENT 'file duration in seconds',
  fileSize INT NULL COMMENT 'file size in bytes',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (userId) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
);
